query:
-- First, get the user ID of the logged-in user (we'll use a recent user)
-- Create a driver profile for user ID 1 (assuming this is your user)
INSERT INTO drivers (userId, phone, licenseNumber, rating, totalRides, isOnline, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  '+1-555-0100',
  'CA-DL-123456',
  '4.8',
  42,
  false,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Verify the driver was created
SELECT * FROM drivers WHERE userId = 1;
